synopsis:
The story revolves around the life of the Rod family, who runs a seafood restaurant. Their peaceful life is disrupted by their daughter Rococo's dream of playing football. Although Rococo is exceptionally talented, Rod, haunted by painful memories from his youth, doesn't want her to step onto the football field. Ignoring her father's objections, Rococo, along with her brother and friends, joins the football team, forging a new way of communicating through the sport. However, a hostile rival has also set its sights on their team, putting them in danger.

As the conflict between father and daughter escalates, they gradually realize each other's importance. Through football, they begin to understand each other's feelings and gradually resolve their differences. Ultimately, father and daughter unite, overcome difficulties, and win the match, thwarting the evil forces' plot. This story emphasizes the importance of family relationships, understanding, and unity. Through football, father and daughter are able to reconnect, overcome difficulties together, and realize the daughter's football dream.

(Source: Douban, translated)
